[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing's]] '''blockade runner''' was a small [[CR-series/Legends|CR-series]] [[corvette]] that had once belonged to the [[Senex/Legends|Senex]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] who kidnapped Sing as a young girl. It was comparable in size to a [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruiser]] and had a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] design aesthetic. After finishing her [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] training, Aurra Sing took revenge on her kidnappers and stole their blockade runner. Sing would leave the ship adrift as a decoy for pursuers while ambushing them from [[Aurra Sing's starfighter|her starfighter]].
